caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" sits in a room filled with framed photographs on the walls. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone on a stand. In the background, a white mannequin torso is visible. Two logos are displayed on the screen: one on the left featuring "PODCAST" and one on the right featuring "PODCAST" in red text. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks and shifts his posture, initially raising his left arm high in the first frame. He then lowers his arm and looks toward the side of the frame. By the final frame, he raises his left arm again, gesturing with his hand as he continues to talk into the microphone.
